---
title: "SwitchBot Thermo-Hygrometer Calibration"
date: 2026-07-04
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Simulated

## Temperature Over Time by Device

![](results/simulated/figures/temperature_by_device.png)

## Humidity Over Time by Device

![](results/simulated/figures/humidity_by_device.png)

## Mean Temperature Heatmap

![](results/simulated/figures/temperature_heatmap.png)

## Mean Humidity Heatmap

![](results/simulated/figures/humidity_heatmap.png)

# Actual

## Temperature Over Time by Device

![](results/actual/figures/temperature_by_device.png)

## Humidity Over Time by Device

![](results/actual/figures/humidity_by_device.png)

## Mean Temperature Heatmap

![](results/actual/figures/temperature_heatmap.png)

## Mean Humidity Heatmap

![](results/actual/figures/humidity_heatmap.png)
